executives.name: Jason Attew
executives.background: Mr. Attew is a mining industry veteran with over 25 years of experience in the sector. He previously served as President and CEO of Gold Standard Ventures Corp. and as CFO of Goldcorp Inc.

executives.name: Frédéric Ruel
executives.background: Mr. Ruel has over 20 years of experience in financial reporting and the mining industry. He has been with Osisko since its inception in 2014.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Vice President, Finance

executives.name: Iain McPhie
executives.background: Mr. McPhie has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in corporate development and legal affairs.

executives.name: Heather Taylor
executives.background: Ms. Taylor has extensive experience in investor relations and corporate communications within the resource sector.

executives.name: André Le Bel
executives.background: Mr. Le Bel has over 30 years of experience in corporate law and has served as legal counsel for several mining companies.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Legal Affairs and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Penny Westman
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Westman is a lawyer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Barrick Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Jason Attew
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Attew is the President and CEO of Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Joanne Ferstman
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Ferstman is a corporate director with over 20 years of experience in the financial services sector.

board_of_directors.name: Edie Hofmeister
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Hofmeister is an attorney with over 25 years of experience in legal and ESG matters in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Candace MacGibbon
board_of_directors.background: Ms. MacGibbon is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining and financial sectors.

board_of_directors.name: William McInnes
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McInnes is a lawyer with over 35 years of experience in corporate and securities law, specifically in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Pierre-Sébastien Thivierge
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Thivierge is a lawyer and has held various senior positions in the mining industry and legal practice.
